$note: Expected DCU ISA patterns per optimization method. Used by sass_check.py with dccobjdump --show-sass. Source-level builtins are candidate routes only; final verification is target ISA such as v_mmac/MMOP, ds_read_m32x*, matrix_load*, buffer/global LDS, waits, and resource usage.

compute.mmac_tensor_core.note: Hygon HCU matrix core. Source-backed HCU/AMD-named builtins are implementation routes; final proof is v_mmac/MMOP ISA, not source names.

compute.mixed_precision_fp8_bf8.note: gfx938 low-precision conversion or HCU MMAC ISA forms. FP4 is intentionally absent.

compute.launch_config_wave64.note: Launch geometry is verified by timing and occupancy/PMC evidence.

compute.thread_coarsening.note: Dense VALU arithmetic after coarsening or register tiling.

compute.register_pressure_control.note: Verified by dccobjdump resource usage, hipcc resource usage, occupancy, and timing.

compute.fast_math_intrinsics.note: Fast math lowering is instruction- and tolerance-specific.

compute.inline_asm_builtin.note: Case-specific; compare dccobjdump against intended asm or target-compiled low-level code.

memory.coalesced_access.note: Global/buffer/flat memory path should be visible; coalescing quality also needs address mapping and counters.

memory.vectorized_global_access.note: Packed global-memory operations should be visible when vectorization survives lowering.

memory.aligned_layout_transform.note: Layout transforms are verified by address/stride logic, coalescing metrics, and end-to-end timing.

memory.global_to_lds_async.note: Direct global/buffer-to-LDS staging path. raw_buffer_load_lds is an ISA/staging signature; use source-backed builtin wrappers only after target compile.

memory.matrix_load_mls.note: Verified by target ISA, CK Tile/HCU MLS source diff, correctness, and timing. Source-backed matrix-load builtins must compile before use.

memory.ds_read_matrix_layout.note: Hygon matrix-read layout contract from LDS. The m32x16/m32x32 forms are source-backed by microbenchmarks; m32x64_b4 and m32x8_b32 are manual-backed and should be source-probed before use.

memory.lds_bank_conflict.note: Layout change is primarily verified by PMC bank-conflict counters; swizzle may appear as xor/shift address math.

memory.cache_policy_glc_slc.note: Cache/coherency modifiers must appear on the intended memory ops.

memory.ck_tile_named_pipeline.note: CK Tile HCU fast paths normally lower to MMAC/LDS/MLS or direct LDS loader instructions.

memory.epilogue_fusion.note: Verified by source structure, fewer launches/global passes, and timing.

latency.waitcnt_pipeline.note: Wait-count scheduling should be visible in ISA.

latency.reduce_barrier.note: Absence/reduction must be checked against the previous dump.

latency.wavefront_shuffle_ds_bpermute.note: Wavefront exchange through DS routing or HIP shuffle lowering.

latency.ilp_unroll.note: Verified by schedule shape, lower loop overhead, and timing; no universal single mnemonic.

latency.persistent_scheduler.note: Persistent scheduling is verified by grid/work-loop structure and timing.

latency.split_k_streamk.note: Split-K/Stream-K may use atomics, partial stores, barriers, or a combine kernel; source and timing evidence are required.

latency.salu_valu_phase_balance.note: Balance is verified by schedule/metric movement, not one mnemonic.

latency.sqtt_stall_triage.note: Diagnostic method; verified by hipprof SQTT artifacts.
